findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "search_templates" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Search the public meme template library before committing to a format. Use mediaType=gif or mediaType=all before calling generate_gif.

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

name: get_ai_quota
description: Read the keyed AI quota before deciding whether to spend a generation run.
